title: CI: implement/fix swagger docs
body:
The swagger.yml workflow is skipped as it depends on secrets that we do not have right now.

Now there is more to the story here, first of all the old GCP bucket we use for the yaml with is used by the API docs should likely;y be removed. Since we no longer use GCP for any testing it does not really make sense to keep it, though I guess we must keep the old link working at least for some time.

That means we need a new location to upload this, one option is using the oracle cloud bucket from the CNCF account.
Alternatively we could say we just commit the file in the repo  and refernce this via the github raw url from the api docs, this seems the most simple thing to me at the cost of contributors having to regenerate the yaml if they change swagger docs. But that may be a good thing as we see the final yaml and can ensure no unexpected breaking is there
